title: 🔐 Strong Password
description: Use letters, numbers & symbols like @ #  % to create strong passwords.

title: 🚫 Do Not Share OTP
description: Never share your OTP or verification codes with anyone.

title: ⚠️ Avoid Unknown Links
description: Do not click suspicious links in emails or messages.

title: 🧑‍💻 Safe Browsing
description: Only visit trusted websites with https:// and a lock icon 🔒.

title: 📱 Lock Your Device
description: Always use PIN, pattern, or fingerprint to secure your device.

title: 👀 Beware of Strangers
description: Do not talk to unknown people online or share personal details.

title: 📧 Email Safety
description: Do not open attachments from unknown emails.

title: 🎮 Safe Gaming
description: Do not share personal info in online games or chats.

title: 📸 Think Before Sharing
description: Do not upload private photos or information online.

title: 🔄 Regular Updates
description: Keep your apps and system updated for better security.

title: 🔑 Use Unique Passwords
description: Use different passwords for different accounts.

title: 📶 Secure Wi-Fi
description: Avoid using public Wi-Fi for sensitive activities.

title: 🛑 Logout After Use
description: Always log out from shared or public computers.

title: 🧠 Think Before You Click
description: If something looks too good to be true, it probably is!

title: 🛡️ Antivirus Protection
description: Install antivirus apps to protect your device.
